purpose: Machine-readable registry for routing authenticated connector apps as domain agents in the DAIOF global operating mesh.
last_probe_context: ChatGPT connector runtime probe; read-only and controlled-write operations only.

risk_classes.R4: External, irreversible, financial, production, phone-call, delete, merge, publish, or deploy side effect

health_states.active: Tool succeeds and returns usable data
health_states.active_empty: Tool succeeds but accessible dataset is empty
health_states.blocked: Safety/policy layer blocked current probe path
health_states.untested: Connector discovered but not probed in this session
health_states.available_tools_discovered: Tool surface discovered through registry but no live identity/data probe executed

agents.routing_role: Source-of-truth, code/doc evolution, branch-first audit ledger
agents.governance: Never write to main by default; prefer branch and draft PR; merge is R4.

agents.routing_role: Execution queue and operational work graph
agents.governance: Task/project creation should be sandboxed or explicitly tied to current operational objective.
Do not route live execution to Linear until reauthenticated.

agents.routing_role: Business memory, CRM, customer and commercial pipeline
agents.governance: CRM writes require explicit confirmation unless confirmations are waived for the session.
Reads and integration planning allowed; financial side effects are R4 and require separate confirmation.

agents.routing_role: Design cognition, design-to-code, diagrams, visual planning
agents.governance: Design reads are R1; new diagrams/decks are R2/R3; direct Figma mutations require explicit file context.

agents.routing_role: Visual document and marketing artifact generation
agents.governance: Existing design edits require transaction discipline; commits to designs require explicit approval.
Cannot serve as source-of-truth until base exists.

observed_scope: self-user probe previously blocked by safety path
agents.routing_role: Knowledge base, structured memory, meeting notes
agents.governance: Prefer search/fetch before create; do not delete or replace content without review.

observed_scope: initial user reader blocked by safety path
agents.routing_role: Deployment, preview, hosting, serverless and environment operations
agents.governance: Production deploy, env var mutation, and access-control updates are R4.
Unknown verdict is not proof of safety; reporting requires explicit user intent.

observed_scope: AI agent courses and tutorials returned
agents.governance: Use for capability learning; not a source for private execution state.

agents.routing_role: Strategic academic learning and course comparison
agents.governance: Use only for edX-related educational queries.

agents.routing_role: Models, datasets, ML docs, Spaces, compute jobs
agents.governance: Do not route compute jobs without explicit objective and cost/risk boundary.
Use only when meeting context is relevant; preserve citations.
Site creation/publishing is high-impact; listing sites is safe read.

agents.routing_role: AI app generation and product prototyping
agents.governance: Creating app projects should be sandboxed and explicitly scoped.
Requires real business name and description; do not invent identity.
Sending invoices is R4; interactive form is safer than direct send.
Availability checks are safe; registration actions are outside this tool surface.

agents.routing_role: Music catalog lookup and playlist draft enrichment
agents.governance: Do not claim playlist creation; only draft and link via returned metadata.
Phone calls are external side effects; require ready plan and confirmation.
Use for campaign research; outreach would require a separate channel and confirmation.
Balance checks require exact account number from latest user message only.

agents.routing_role: API key provisioning and OpenAI platform setup
agents.governance: Never expose raw keys in chat; use setup flow or encrypted local flow depending on surface.
Search/list only; applications or outreach are out-of-scope.

default_route_order: GitHubAgent for source-of-truth and governed artifacts
AsanaAgent or LinearAgent for execution graph
StripeAgent or PayPalAgent for monetization planning
FigmaAgent or CanvaAgent for design artifacts
NetlifyAgent/WixSiteAgent/LovableAgent for deployment or app surfaces
DataCamp/edX/HuggingFace for learning and model research
global_governance_rule: Connector apps are authenticated domain agents. Route through D&R, evidence, risk class, and audit trail before mutation.
